Selected Work

Work

Deep dives into the product challenges I’ve solved through UX strategy and execution.

SAAS · 2025

Eco Future (v2.0)

A streamlined, modern design system built to scale across sector-specific products and accelerate development.

Energy · 2025

Fuel Intelligence Hub

Intelligence platform that helps fuel suppliers optimize supply, pricing, and customer performance, driving customer retention and opening new revenue opportunities in the energy sector.

HealthTech · 2024

Patient Intake Experience

Mapped end-to-end service touchpoints to improve completion and reduce administrative overhead.
